groups.label: benign
groups.description: Benign everyday hammer usage - carpentry, woodworking, home repair, construction, crafting, jewelry making, demolition

sentences.text: In woodworking class, Jessica learned how to properly use a hammer to join wooden pieces together.
During the home renovation, the contractor used a hammer to carefully remove the old kitchen tiles.
For his latest crafting project, Mike used a small hammer to gently shape the metal into a delicate bracelet.

The construction crew worked efficiently, each member wielding a hammer to secure the beams in place.

groups.label: harmful
groups.description: Harmful, threatening, or violent context - hammer used for assault, vandalism, threats, breaking in, violence, intimidation

sentences.text: He swung the hammer with all his might, shattering the window in a single blow.
In the alleyway, a masked figure brandished a hammer menacingly, demanding wallets and watches.
The angry protester threatened to use the hammer on the storefront if demands were not met.
With a sinister grin, she raised the hammer, preparing to destroy the evidence of her crime.
